name: Whirlpool Corporation
description: Whirlpool Corporation is a leading global manufacturer and marketer of major home appliances, dedicated to improving life at home for over 110 years. Headquartered in Benton Harbor, Michigan, the company operates a diverse portfolio of iconic brands, including Whirlpool, KitchenAid, Maytag, and JennAir. Whirlpool focuses on innovation, sustainability, and community impact, consistently evolving its product offerings to meet the changing needs of consumers worldwide. Through its commitment to operational excellence and corporate responsibility, the company maintains a significant manufacturing presence and a robust global supply chain, striving to create meaningful value for its stakeholders and communities.
